name: Backpack
description: Carries 4 Enc. Counts as 'worn' when strapped to your back.

name: Barrel
description: Carries 12 Enc. Capacity: 32 gallons of liquid.

name: Cask
description: Carries 4 Enc. Capacity: 10 gallons of liquid.

name: Flask
description: Carries 0 Enc. Capacity: 1 pint of liquid.

name: Jug
description: Carries 1 Enc. Capacity: 1 gallon of liquid.

name: Pewter Stein
description: Carries 0 Enc.

name: Pouch
description: Carries 1 Enc.

name: Sack
description: Carries 4 Enc. Requires 1 hand to carry.

name: Sack, Large
description: Carries 6 Enc. Requires 1 hand to carry (or 2 hands if full).

name: Saddlebags
description: Carries 8 Enc.

name: Sling Bag
description: Carries 2 Enc. Counts as 'worn' when slung over your shoulder.

name: Scroll Case
description: Carries 0 Enc.

name: Waterskin
description: Carries 1 Enc. Capacity: 1 gallon of liquid.

name: Cloak
description: Protects wearer against the elements.

name: Coat
description: Protects against the elements and extreme cold; without a good coat you receive penalties to resist cold exposure.

name: Courtly Garb
description: Nobles' garb with lace cuffs, collars, and high-quality fabric. Servants' surcoats can be purchased at half price.

name: Jewellery
description: Prices vary by craftsmanship, metal type, and gem value.

name: Sceptre
description: Carried by the highest-ranking legal officials to indicate their status.

name: Signet Ring
description: Gold rings with engraved stamps worn by nobles and guild officials.

name: Walking Cane
description: Polished wooden cane with metal cap; a status symbol amongst wealthier townsfolk.

name: Ale, keg
description: Capacity 3 gallons. Empty kegs can be refilled for 18d.

name: Bugman's XXXXXX Ale, pint
description: Potent Dwarfen ale. Counts as 4 mugs of normal ale for intoxication; grants immunity to Fear Tests for 1d10 hours.

name: Room, common/night
description: Guests sleeping in common rooms should be wary of thieves.

name: Animal Trap
description: Used to catch game.

name: Antitoxin Kit
description: Contains a small knife, herbs, and leeches. A successful Heal Test removes all Poisoned Conditions.

name: Disguise Kit
description: Contains props for four disguises (wigs, make-up, wax, fake blood, prosthetics).

name: Fish Hooks (12)
description: Used to catch fish.

name: Lock Picks
description: Assortment of small tools needed to use the Pick Lock Skill without penalty.

name: Manacles
description: Prisoners breaking out suffer 1 Wound and must pass a Very Hard (–30) Strength Test.

name: Pole (3 yards)
description: Counts as an Improvised Weapon.

name: Reading Lens
description: Grants +20 to Read/Write Tests for tiny writing and +20 to Perception Tests for fine details.

name: Writing Kit
description: Contains a quill pen, inkpot, and ink blotter.

name: Book, Apothecary
description: Contains ingredient descriptions and brewing instructions; includes formulas for Digestive Tonics, Healing Draughts, and Vitality Draughts.

name: Book, Art
description: Plays, poems, ballads, musical arrangements, or treatises on art by famous painters or sculptors.

name: Book, Cryptography
description: Hand-scribed codices on mathematics, numerology, and polyalphabetic encryption.

name: Book, Engineer
description: Press-printed engineering texts, often authored or edited by Dwarfs.

name: Book, Law
description: Legislation in bound volumes; often combines printed and written pages from different towns.

name: Book, Magic
description: Spell grimoire usually scribed by wizards; carrying one is punishable as heresy unless owner is licensed.

name: Book, Medicine
description: Medical texts including detailed autopsy drawings and procedural diagrams.

name: Book, Religion
description: Religious texts in all forms; many cheaply produced by printing presses.

name: Guild License
description: Printed on parchment, stamped with an official seal. Granted to guild members, not purchased.

name: Legal Document
description: A simple legal document such as a will, IOU, or letter of intent.

name: Trade Tools
description: Required for Trade Tests to make or fix items. Covers all trade specialities (Apothecary, Smith, Herbalist, etc.).

name: Workshop
description: Required for larger crafting projects. Enc listed as N/A in source (not a carried item).

name: Cart
description: Carries 25 Enc. Requires one driver and one draft animal.

name: Coach
description: Carries 80 Enc. Standard: two drivers and four horses.

name: Coracle
description: Carries 10 Enc. Small leather or bark boat for one person; rowed with a single oar.

name: Destrier
description: Carries 20 Enc. Horse trained for war.

name: Draught Horse
description: Carries 20 Enc.

name: Homing Pigeons
description: Carries 0 Enc.

name: Hunting Dog
description: Carries 0 Enc.

name: Light Warhorse
description: Carries 18 Enc.

name: Monkey
description: Carries 1 Enc.

name: Mule
description: Carries 14 Enc.

name: Pony
description: Carries 14 Enc.

name: Riding Horse
description: Carries 16 Enc.

name: River Barge
description: Carries 300 Enc. Standard crew: three.

name: Row Boat
description: Carries 60 Enc. Standard crew: one rower.

name: Wagon
description: Carries 30 Enc. Standard: one driver and two horses.

name: Black Lotus
description: Deadly blade venom. Victims hit for 1+ Wound take 2 Poisoned Conditions; resisted with Difficult (–10) Endurance.

name: Heartkill
description: Odourless poison from Amphisbaena and Jabberslythe venoms. When ingested inflicts 4 Poisoned Conditions; resisted with Difficult (–10) Endurance.

name: Mad Cap Mushrooms
description: Hallucinogenic. Adds +10 Strength, +4 Wounds, and Frenzy; user loses 1d10 Wounds when effect ends. Duration: 2d10 minutes.

name: Mandrake Root
description: Highly addictive deliriant. WP Test each Round to act; Movement halved; Cool Tests +20. Duration: 1d10×10 minutes.

name: Moonflower
description: Tranquilliser. Elves gain +30 to resist Black Plague; others risk Unconscious Condition or gain +20 Cool. Duration: 1d10+5 hours.

name: Ranald's Delight
description: Stimulant. +1 Movement and +10 to WS, S, T, Agi for 3 hours; afterwards –2 Movement and –20 to those Characteristics.

name: Spit
description: Powerful hallucinogen. Fail Very Hard (–30) Toughness or be lost in vivid fantasy. Duration: 1d10 minutes.

name: Weirdroot
description: Common street drug. Chewed for euphoria; +10 Toughness and Willpower, –10 Agility, Initiative, and Intelligence. Duration: 1d10×10 minutes.

name: Digestive Tonic
description: Provides +20 to recovery Tests from stomach ailments such as Galloping Trots or Bloody Flux.

name: Earth Root
description: Negates Buboes from Black Plague; grants +10 on all related Tests. Dose: 1 per day.

name: Faxtoryll
description: Herbal coagulant; poultices remove all Bleeding Conditions without a Heal Test. Dose: 1 per Critical Wound.

name: Healing Draught
description: Immediately recover Toughness Bonus Wounds if you have more than 0. Dose: 1 per encounter.

name: Healing Poultice
description: Prevents Minor Infections from a treated Critical Wound.

name: Nightshade
description: Causes deep sleep after 2–3 hours unless Endurance Test passed; lasts 1d10+4 hours. Dose: 1 per person.

name: Salwort
description: Crushed sprig removes 1 Stunned Condition when held under someone's nose. Dose: 1 per encounter.

name: Vitality Draught
description: Instantly removes all Fatigued Conditions.

name: Eye Patch
description: Often decorated; used to cover scarred eye sockets.

name: False Eye
description: Comes in many forms from wooden to polished glass; popular with the wealthy.

name: False Leg
description: Ignores 1 point of Movement loss from missing limb. For 100 XP recover last Movement point; for 200 XP relearn Dodge.

name: Gilded Nose
description: Usually wood or ceramic. Ignore the Fellowship loss for having no nose.

name: Hook
description: Replaces a lost hand. Buy back –20 penalty for 100 XP per 5 subtracted. Counts as a Dagger in Close Combat.

name: Engineering Marvel
description: Steam-powered prosthetic from Engineers' Guild. Fully replaces lost ear, hand, arm, or leg; breaks on Critical Wound and costs 10%+ to repair.

name: Wooden Teeth
description: False teeth; ignore all penalties for loss of teeth.

name: Bandage
description: A successful Heal Test removes +1 extra Bleeding Condition.

name: Bedroll
description: Endurance Tests to resist cold exposure gain +20 when resting.

name: Candle (dozen)
description: Provides illumination for 10 yards when lit.

name: Davrich Lamp
description: Safety lamp for mines; flares in firedamp and causes explosion after 1d10 rounds.

name: Grappling Hook
description: Coupled with a rope, allows unscalable surfaces to be climbed.

name: Instrument
description: Medium-sized instrument (e.g. mandolin). Small: half price, 0 Enc. Large: double price, 2 Enc.

name: Lamp Oil
description: Fuel for 4 hours standard or 8 hours at low flame.

name: Lantern
description: Provides illumination for 20 yards.

name: Storm Lantern
description: Shuttered; illuminates 20 yards (30 targeted). Flame protected from wind.

name: Tent
description: Medium tent for four people. Small (2 people): half price, 1 Enc. Large (8 people): double price, 4 Enc.

name: Local Scout
description: Daily: 15d. Weekly: 10/–. Works independently without Leadership Tests.

name: Seasoned Mercenary
description: Daily: 9/–. Weekly: 3GC/12/–. Demands a share of loot in lieu of danger pay.

name: Lawyer
description: Daily: 9/–. Weekly: 3GC/12/–. Drafting a simple legal document costs 2–4 shillings.

name: Porter
description: Daily: 3/–. Weekly: 1GC/4/–. Carries 10 Encumbrance points.

name: Scribe
description: Daily: 6/–. Weekly: 2GC/8/–. Also translates 1–2 other common languages.

name: Doktor
description: Daily: 15/–. Weekly: 5GC. A single visit costs 4–6 shillings for medical attention.
